title: Sentinel Shield external-adopter usability scorecard
description: Consolidated, machine-readable verdict produced by scripts/report-adopter-usability.sh from one or more adopter-session records (schemas/adopter-session.schema.json). It scores the adopter experience against the fixed set of BLOCKING production-readiness criteria and yields a single pass/fail. Every criterion is derived deterministically from the session evidence; a criterion FAILS CLOSED when the evidence is missing, malformed, stale, or ambiguous. Every failed criterion carries an explicit, copy-pasteable reproduction command. The scorecard carries NO secrets and NO absolute local paths (the generator refuses to emit one that would).

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC time the scorecard was generated.

budget_seconds_default.description: Per-step wall-clock budget applied to sessions that do not declare their own budget_seconds.

sessions_evaluated.description: Number of adopter-session records folded into this scorecard. Must be >= 1: an empty evidence set fails closed (no scorecard is emitted).

scenarios.description: Per-scenario summary, one entry per evaluated session.

scenario.description: Scenario id (from the session's scenario field, else its harness).

source.description: Redacted basename of the session file this summary came from.

budget_seconds.description: The per-step budget applied to this scenario.

recovery.description: Recovery evidence carried by the session, if any.

skipped_scenarios.description: Scenarios the adopter suite could not run (e.g. an unsupported flow offline). Informational and always explicitly reasoned; a skip is NOT counted as a pass.

criteria.description: The fixed set of BLOCKING adopter-scorecard criteria, each evaluated across every session.

blocking.description: Every scorecard criterion is blocking. Fixed true.

status.description: pass only when NO offender was found across all evaluated sessions.

offenders.description: Redacted, evidence-anchored offenders (scenario + step + detail). Empty when status=pass.

reproduction.description: A copy-pasteable command that reproduces this criterion's verdict from the session evidence.

result.description: Overall production-readiness verdict: pass only when EVERY blocking criterion passed across EVERY evaluated session and at least one session was evaluated.
